resources.string: Previous code was incorrect, please try again.
Use the Steam Mobile App to confirm your sign in…
Please enter your 2-factor auth code from your authenticator app.
Please enter the auth code sent to the email at %s

The app being installed has the following space requirements. Would you like to proceed?

	Download Size: %1$s
	Size on Disk: %2$s
	Available Space: %3$s
The app being installed needs %1$s of space but there is only %2$s left on this device
Are you sure you want to cancel the download of the app?
Delete all downloaded data for this game?
The Ubuntu image needs to be downloaded and installed before being able to edit the configuration. This operation might take a few minutes. Would you like to continue?
The Ubuntu image needs to be installed before being able to edit the configuration. This operation might take a few minutes. Would you like to continue?
This will reset your container to the default configuration.
Please ensure your saves are uploaded to the cloud or backed up before verifying, as they may be overwritten otherwise.
Please ensure your saves are uploaded to the cloud or backed up before updating, as they may be overwritten otherwise.
You must be logged into Steam to use this feature
ImageFS installed. Please try editing container again.
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s? This action cannot be undone.

The app being installed has the following space requirements. Would you like to proceed?

	Download Size: %1$s
	Available Space: %2$s
This will check all installed files against the download manifest to detect missing or corrupted files.\n\nThis may take a while for large games.
Verifying files… This may take a while.
All files verified successfully.\n\n%1$d / %2$d files OK.

Verification found issues.

%1$d / %2$d files OK
%3$d missing
%4$d size mismatch
%5$d hash mismatch

Reinstall the game to fix corrupted files.
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s? This action cannot be undone.

The app being installed has the following space requirements. Would you like to proceed?

	Download Size: %1$s
	Available Space: %2$s
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s? This action cannot be undone.

The app being installed has the following space requirements. Would you like to proceed?

	Download Size: %1$s
	Size on Disk: %2$s
	Available Space: %3$s
Are you sure you want to cancel the download of the app?
Delete all downloaded data for this game?
Download alternate game versions from Steam using developer-provided branches. Enter access codes to unlock private branches.
Track active, paused, and resumable downloads
Cancel download and delete files for %1$s?
Add or play some games to get GOG recommendations based on your library.
A saved collection was removed in Steam and is no longer filtered.
Showing last synced collections. Connect to update.
Only standard collections are shown. Smart collections aren\'t supported yet.
Remove this path from scanning? The folder contents will stay on disk.
Path removed from list. Content has not been deleted.
Remove this manually added folder from your library? This does not delete files on disk.
Folders in these paths are scanned for .exe files and listed as custom games. This may slow down the app startup time.
This game has multiple executables. Please open Custom Game Settings to select which one to launch.
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s?
Width and height must be greater than 0
Width must be greater than height
%s is not installed. Please install the game first before launching.
Could not launch game: invalid launch shortcut
Game will launch when Steam connects
Game will launch when service is ready
Steam login failed — game launch cancelled
Game service failed to start — game launch cancelled
The executable could not be auto-selected. Please set the executable path in container settings.
Temporary container configuration changes were applied for this launch. Do you want to save them?
Changes apply instantly to the current game.
Official AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 1.0 using EASU + RCAS with a lower internal render resolution and full-resolution upscale.
CAS and DLS are applied through vkBasalt and take effect the next time you launch the game.
Adds dark outlines for a cel-shaded look.
Smooths jagged edges with a light post-process anti-aliasing pass.
Adds a bloom and contrast boost for a punchier image.
Adds scanlines and subtle chromatic aberration.
Adds retro composite TV warping, bleed, and scanlines.
%1$d running, tap/click a process to close
Show or hide the in-game overlay.
Caps the in-game frame rate. Max: %1$d Hz.
Limiter overridden while LSFG is active. Source rate is paced by the multiplier.
Quickly switch between common HUD layouts.
Adjust HUD size and background opacity.
Choose which stats appear in the overlay.
Automatically hide on-screen controls when a physical controller is connected
Change the type of this control
Range button bindings are automatically generated
Which set of keys to cycle through
Layout direction of the range button
Number of key segments shown at once: %1$d
Tap to activate, tap again to deactivate
Hex color for the control outline, icon, and text
Adjust control outline and divider thickness
Allow this button touch to also control dynamic shooter movement/look
No other controls available to copy appearance from
Buttons support up to 2 bindings: primary (press) and secondary (long press)
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save or discard them?
No other elements available to copy size from
Joystick output for left side movement
Multiplier for right-side horizontal mouse look
Multiplier for right-side vertical mouse look
Reverse up and down mouse-look movement
Blend look movement between touch samples
Increase mouse-look speed as the touch movement gets faster
How quickly faster drags add extra mouse speed
Upper multiplier applied during fast mouse-look drags
Opacity for dynamic joystick rings and thumbs
Show the Enable Mouse / Enable Sticks button while shooter mode is active
Size multiplier for the left-side dynamic joystick
Ignore small left-side movement joystick input
Changes how quickly the virtual left stick reaches full output
How the left-side joystick center behaves during long drags
Size multiplier when look type outputs gamepad right stick
Ignore small gamepad right-stick look input
Changes how quickly the virtual right stick reaches full output
How the right-side joystick center behaves when look type is gamepad right stick
Right side behavior in shooter mode
Screen width reserved for left-side movement touches
Allow dragging from on-screen buttons to aim or move
How dynamic joystick centers behave during long drags
Use a sprint input while the movement joystick is near its edge
Joystick distance needed to activate sprint
Tap the sprint input once when entering the sprint ring instead of holding it
Configure button mappings for your physical controller
Failed to save logcat to destination
Saves a snapshot of the logcat only for this app\'s PID

Handling of flags on CALL/RET opcodes

0 : Treats CALL/RET as if it never needed flags (faster, unstable)
1 : Most RET will need flags, most CALLS will not
2 : All CALL/RET will need flags (slower)
Use of Float/Double for x87 emulation

Dynarec building BigBlock

0 : Don\'t try to build block as big as possible
1 : Build Dynarec block as big as possible
2 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, but only for blocks in elf memory)
3 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, for all types of memory)

Simulation of Strong Memory model

0 : Don\'t try anything special
1 : Enable some Memory Barrier when writing to memory (on some MOV opcode)
2 : All 1 plus a Memory Barrier on every write to memory using MOV
3 : All 2 plus Memory Barrier when reading from memory and on some SSE/SSE2 opcodes

Tweak memory barriers to reduce performance impact of strong memory emulation

0 : Use regular safe barriers
1 : Use weak barriers for mild performance boost
2 : Use weak barriers, additionally disable last write barriers

Generate aligned atomics only (only available on Arm64 for now).

0 : Generate unaligned atomics handling code.
1 : Generate aligned atomics only, which is faster and smaller code size, but will cause SIGBUS for LOCK prefixed opcodes operating on aligned data addresses.

Enable or disable the use of deferred flags.

0 : Disable the use of deferred flags.
1 : Enable the use of deferred flags.

Allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.

0 : Do not allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.
1 : Allow continue to run a dynablock that write data in the same page as code. It can gets faster in loading time of some game but can also get unexpected crashes.
2 : Will also, when it detect an HotPage, flag that page as NEVERCLEAN, and so it will not be write protected but Block build from that page will always be tested. It can be faster that way (but some SMC case might not be trapped).

Enable or disable the use of native flags.

0 : Do not use native flags.
1 : Use native flags when possible.

Enable x86 PAUSE emulation, may help the performance of spinlocks.

0 : Ignore x86 PAUSE instruction.
1 : Use YIELD to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.
2 : Use WFI to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.
3 : Use SEVL+WFE to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.

AVX and AVX2 implemented, along with BMI1, BMI2, ADX, FMA, F16C and RDANDR extension!

0 : Disable AVX extension
1 : enable AVX, BMI1, F16C and VAES extension.
2 : All 1 plus enable AVX2, BMI2, FMA, ADX,VPCLMULQDQ and RDRAND.
\
Maximum number of CPUs presented to programs by box64
Detect UnityPlayer.dll and apply strongmem settings
Force every memory allocation in 32bit address spaces
Defines the max allowed forward value when building Block
Defines whether or not Dynarec will wait for the FillBlock to be ready
Enables TSO IR ops (required for multithreaded apps).
Makes vector load/stores atomic when TSO is enabled.
Uses half-barrier atomics for unaligned loads/stores under TSO.
Makes REP MOVS / REP STOS atomic under TSO.
Enables multiblock code compilation. Can cause longer JIT compilation and stutter.
Uses volatile metadata from PE files for TSO when available.
Special SMC + JIT block hacks for Mono detection.
Hides CPUID hypervisor bit (useful for apps that crash with it).
Disables FEXCore JIT L2 cache lookup, saving memory but introducing stutters.
Switches FEXCore JIT L1 cache to be dynamically sized, saving memory but introducing stutters.
Emulates X87 floating point using 64-bit precision. This reduces emulation accuracy and may result in rendering bugs.
Maximum instruction budget per translation block. Higher values can improve performance but may reduce stability.
Please select the folder containing the game files you want to add as a custom game.
For 8BitDo FlipPad/GameSir Pocket Taco type controllers
Are you sure you want to remove driver "%s"? This cannot be undone
Only use if you get \'Application Load Error 3:0000065432\'.
Only enable if DLCs are not detected or saves with DLC are not working
Disable cloud save sync for this game and keep saves on device only
Reduces performance and slows down launch\nAllows online play and fixes DRM and controller issues\nNot all games work
Enables online play, improves compatibility\nDoes not always work\nBack up your saves before trying this
Launch Steam games in offline mode
Updates Steam to the latest version. Significantly reduces performance.
Launch Epic games in offline mode
Turn off for better performance. Keep on to fix inverted colors.
Disabling may fix graphical glitches on some devices
Use legacy GLRenderer instead of VulkanRenderer. VulkanRenderer improves performance, but is in beta and may cause issues.
View, modify, and create FEXCore presets
Show the live P1-P4 controller slot panel in the in-game quick menu
Auto-replace stick elements with dynamic joysticks
Movement needed to lock gesture type (lower = more responsive)
Direct works for most games. Use Relative if dragging causes camera or cursor issues
Show a circle at tap location
Show temporary gesture labels at top center
Keep the mouse cursor visible while touchscreen gestures are active
Choose how a connected presentation display should behave
Swap screens so the game renders on the external display and this device becomes the controller surface
On-screen controls will be hidden when the game starts. Toggle via the navigation menu.
Left stick = WASD, Right stick = mouse. L2 = left click, R2 = right click.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s (%2$s)?
Changing the language requires the app to restart. Do you want to continue?
Choose which orientations can be rotated to when in-game
The initial container settings for each game (does not affect already installed games)
Automatically apply recommended settings for Steam games on first launch
View, modify, and create Box64 presets
Install or remove custom graphics driver packages
Write Wine debug output to file
Write Box86 & Box64 debug output to file
Shows the most recent crash log
Shows the latest Wine/Box64 debug log
[Closes App] Logs out the client and wipes local preference data.
[Closes app] May help fix issues with library items or messages.
Remove all images that were loaded.
Stops the tip message from appearing
View the source code of this project
See what technologies make GameNative possible
Opens a link to GameNative\'s privacy policy
We never track personal information. Disabling this stops non-essential analytics, however core game performance data is still collected as a legitimate interest to improve compatibility.
Links open with your main web browser
Hide status bar when not in game
Hide Android status bar in game list, settings, etc. App will restart when changed.
Swap A↔B and X↔Y button icons
Require double back press to exit — first press shows a warning
Show the controller button hints bar at the bottom of the screen
Import custom games as Steam games
Review game and container storage in one place
Review game and container storage, including installed games without containers
This removes the container for %1$s and frees internal storage. The game files stay installed, but local settings or saves stored inside the Windows environment may be lost.
This uninstalls %1$s, removes its game files, and deletes the linked container.
This uninstalls %1$s and removes its game files. No container will be deleted.
Enable Write to external storage first
Sign in to access your Steam library
Open the Steam mobile app and scan this QR code to sign in instantly
The app being installed needs %1$s of space but there is only %2$s left on this device

The app being installed has the following space requirements. Would you like to proceed?

	Download Size: %1$s
	Size on Disk: %2$s
	Available Space: %3$s
Are you sure you want to cancel the download of the app?
Delete all downloaded data for this game?
Are you sure you want to delete this app?
The Ubuntu image needs to be downloaded and installed before being able to edit the configuration. This operation might take a few minutes. Would you like to continue?
The Ubuntu image needs to be installed before being able to edit the configuration. This operation might take a few minutes. Would you like to continue?
This will reset your container to the default configuration.
Please ensure your saves are uploaded to the cloud or backed up before verifying, as they may be overwritten otherwise.
Please ensure your saves are uploaded to the cloud or backed up before updating, as they may be overwritten otherwise.
Save files are already up to date
Failed to download or install the update. Please try again later.
Failed to download a required component. Please try again later.

Sorry about that!
It would be nice to know about the recent issue you've had.
You can view and export the most recent crash log in the app's settings and attach it as a Github issue in the project's repository.
Link to the Github repo is also in settings!
Support open-source PC gaming on Android by sharing the app with your friends or becoming a member on Ko-fi.
Check out GameNative - play your PC Steam games on Android, with full support for cloud saves!\nhttps://gamenative.app\nJoin the community: https://discord.gg/2hKv4VfZfE
Join the Discord to get support to fix your game or improve performance.
A required file could not be downloaded. Please check your network connection and try again.
System files could not be installed. Please try again. If the problem persists, try a different network or use a VPN.
You are logged in on another device already playing %s. \nYou can still play this game, but that will disconnect the other session from Steam.

You are logged in on another device (%1$s) already playing %2$s (%3$s), and that save is not yet in the cloud. \nYou can still play this game, but that will disconnect the other session from Steam and may create a save conflict when that session progress is synced

There is a new remote save and a new local save, which would you like to keep?

Local save:
	%1$s
Remote save:
	%2$s

We fixed cloud save path handling for this game and found different local and cloud saves. Pick one version to keep.

Local:
	%1$s
Cloud:
	%2$s
Sync operation is taking too long. Please try launching the game again in a moment.
Sync is currently in progress. Please try again in a moment.
Cloud save sync for this game is already running. You can wait and try again, or launch anyway without syncing (may cause save conflicts).
You played %1$s on the device %2$s (%3$s) and the save of that session is still uploading.\nTry again later.

You played %1$s on the device %2$s (%3$s), and that save is not yet in the cloud. (upload not started)\nYou can still play this game, but that may create a conflict when your previous game progress successfully uploads.
App session suspended. Please restart app.
Received pending remote operations whose operation was \'none\'. Please restart app.
Multiple pending remote operations, try again later. Please restart app.
Are you sure you\'d like to discard your changes?

Pluvia - github.com/oxters168/Pluvia
JavaSteam - github.com/Longi94/JavaSteam
Winlator & Vortek - github.com/brunodev85/winlator
Winlator Cmod - github.com/coffincolors/winlator
Wrapper - https://github.com/leegao/bionic-vulkan-wrapper & https://github.com/pipetto-crypto/
Ubuntu RootFs - releases.ubuntu.com/focal
Chatting is still an early feature.\nPlease report any issues in the project repo.
Known config works on your GPU
Known config should work on your GPU
Known config may work on your GPU
No best config available for this game
Failed to fetch config. Please check your network connection.
The following required components are not available:\n\n%1$s
Config applied with missing components replaced by defaults
Sign in to Steam to see your library
Sign in to GOG to see your library
Sign in to Epic to see your library
Sign in to Amazon to see your library
This content includes files outside the trusted set.
All files are trusted. Ready to install.
No installed content for this type.
This content includes files outside the trusted set. Review and confirm to proceed.
Connection timed out. Please check your network and try again.
Higher speeds may cause increased device heat during downloads

Import custom Wine or Proton versions for Bionic containers. Filename must begin with \'wine\' or \'proton\' (case-insensitive). Packages must include bin/, lib/, and prefixPack.txz. All imports are bionic-compatible only.
Select a .wcp file (with filename starting with \'wine\' or \'proton\')
✓ All files are trusted. Ready to install.
No installed Wine or Proton versions found.
This package includes files outside the trusted set. Review and confirm to proceed with installation.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s %2$s (%3$d)? Containers using this version will no longer work.
An import is currently in progress. Cancelling will discard all extracted files and you will need to start the import again.\n\nAre you sure you want to cancel?
Extracting and validating package (this may take 2-3 minutes for large files)...
File is empty or cannot be read
File cannot be recognized as valid archive
Package is missing required files (bin/, lib/, or prefixPack.txz)
Package is not Wine or Proton (type: %s)
This package includes files outside the trusted set.
This Wine/Proton build requires GLIBC containers and is not compatible with GameNative. Please use ARM64/bionic builds only.
No containers are currently using this version.
These containers will no longer work if you proceed:
Sign in to your GOG account
Sign out from your GOG account
This will remove your GOG credentials and clear your GOG library from this device. You can sign in again at any time.
Sign in to your Epic Games account
Sign out from your Epic Games account
This will remove your Epic Games credentials and clear your Epic Games library from this device. You can sign in again at any time.
Logged out from Epic Games successfully
Sign in to your Amazon Games account
Sign out from your Amazon Games account
This will remove your Amazon Games credentials and clear your Amazon library from this device. You can sign in again at any time.
Logged out from Amazon Games successfully
Content is not trusted and was not installed.
Downloaded content does not match expected type.
%1$s MB of mod updates available. Download now or skip?
No diagnostics log yet. Use \"Diagnostic Run\" first.
Log in to Nexus Mods, open your profile menu, then go to Site preferences > API Access. Copy your Personal API Key and paste it here.
Your key is stored locally on this device.
No current downloadable files were found.
%1$d mod(s) ready; %2$d could not be resolved. %3$d selected.
Estimated space needed during import: %1$s; available %2$s.
Includes extracted mod cache kept for reapply/disable safety.
No collection items match this filter.
Plugin load order detected: %1$d plugin(s). GN will use it when applying managed plugins from this collection.
File/mod conflict rules detected: %1$d. These are shown for review; unsupported per-file winners are not silently applied.
Unsupported collection rules: %1$d. Review manual steps before applying order.
Profiles save which mods are enabled and their file priority for this game.
Default profile will be created automatically.
This removes the profile and its mod order. Installed mods are not deleted.
Enable mods for this profile and choose which mod wins when files overlap. Mods higher in this list overwrite lower mods after Apply order.
No Nexus mods imported for this game yet.
This mod did not finish importing.
These mods install some of the same files. The higher-priority mod wins when you apply order.
%1$d more file(s) in this conflict set
These plugin files may be missing, disabled, or loading in the wrong order. Fix these before launching the game.
Some enabled plugins are missing files in the game folder. Apply order can restore them from the mod cache.
Review these plugin load order warnings before launching the game.
Controls the order Bethesda plugin files load in-game. This is separate from mod file priority. Masters must load before plugins that depend on them.
No plugin files found in installed mods.
This enabled plugin is missing from the game folder. Apply order can restore it. Related archive files are missing: %1$s
This enabled plugin is missing from the game folder. Apply order can restore it.
Related archive files are missing from the game folder: %1$s
%1$d file mapping(s) still need manual placement.
Choose a destination inside this game or container.
Create a folder for the selection
On: The selected folder is installed into the destination. Off: Only its contents are placed there.
One path per line. Blank means everything in the mod
Destination is not inside this game or container
Shows storage used by Nexus mod downloads, extracted cache, and backups for this game.
Extracted cache and rollback backups are kept so mods can be reapplied, disabled, or restored safely.
Clean temp removes abandoned files. Delete failed archives removes failed downloads, so retry will download again. Clean redundant backups removes backups that are no longer needed.
Checks for missing mod files, broken install records, unsafe backups, and files that need to be restored.
Select a mod from the Mods tab.
Conflicts and plugin warnings will appear here.
GameNative will back up existing files before replacing them.
GameNative will apply enabled mods from lowest to highest priority and back up replaced files.
Failed to scan Nexus mod diagnostics
At least one profile is required
Profile switched. Use Apply order to update game files.
Disabled in %1$s; %2$d changed file(s) were left in place
Enabled in %1$s. Use Apply order to place files.
Plugin list saved, but missing or disabled masters need attention
The required plugin is not managed by this mod list.
Applying mod order. Large mod lists may take a while.
Fix plugin master warnings before applying order.
Profile order has existing target files. Use Overwrite files and create backups for mods that should win conflicts.
Storage is too low to apply mod order. Free at least %1$s more.
Cleaned %1$s from old mod temp files
Not enough storage. Need about %1$s, available %2$s.
Could not resolve this collection mod
No downloadable mods were returned for this collection
No selected collection mods are ready to download
Collection requested a different file; existing installed file reused
Collection import canceled after %1$d prepared mod(s)%2$s.
Prepared %1$d collection mod(s)%2$s. Applying configured mods.
Enter a valid Nexus mod or collection URL
No downloadable files were returned for this mod
Mod files are already being applied.
Configure the FOMOD installer or choose Custom placement before applying.
Target files already exist. Choose Overwrite files and create backups to replace them.
Mod deleted; %1$d changed file(s) were left in place
%1$d FOMOD file mapping(s) need manual placement
A profile with that name already exists
Purchasing through this link helps support the development of GameNative.
Wishlist now to get notified the moment it launches
Pre-order to be ready at launch
Generate intermediate frames using Lossless Scaling\'s Vulkan layer. Only known to work on Adreno 6xx and above.
Lower is more stable; higher is smoother but can artifact.
Frame generation requires a Bionic container
Lossless Scaling not installed. Tap to install. Only known to work on Adreno 6xx and above.
Lossless Scaling not in your Steam library
This will download Lossless Scaling from Steam to enable frame generation.
For personalized recommendations, we share the games you play with GOG. Turn off anytime in Settings.
Show personalized recommendations. Keeping this on helps support GameNative.
Auto-export installed games for game library frontends
Remove .%1$s files from the previous directory?
Booting may take a few minutes on first launch
Tip: You can view the game files by pressing \"%s\" in the game settings.
Tip: You can go to the main settings menu and download custom drivers for your device to be used on Bionic.
Tip: If you are getting a DirectX error, try using DXVK 1.11.1-sarek and System driver on Bionic.
Tip: If games aren\'t booting for you, check \"%s\" under the settings cog - you should see a spinning cube.
Tip: Use DXVK for DirectX 8/9/10/11 games and VKD3D for DirectX 12 games.
Tip: Use Turnip drivers to play DirectX 12 games. DirectX 12 support for devices that don\'t support Turnip is currently limited.
Tip: If controls don\'t work, enable Steam Input and check that your app isn\'t installed to a private space.
Tip: To add files to the game, place them in your device\'s Downloads folder, hit \"%s\" and they will be in D: drive.
Tip: Import a config from gamenative.app/compatibility for your GPU or GPU family if you can\'t get your game working.
Tip: Use the quick menu performance HUD when you want FPS stats in-game.
Tip: If your game has no audio, use Proton 10 to automatically extract XAudio DLLs.
Tip: You can enable or disable the onscreen controller with your device\'s back key.
Tip: You can bring up the keyboard with your device\'s back key.
Tip: You can tap with two fingers inside the container to right click.
Tip: If you are using the onscreen controller, you can disable the mouse to prevent accidental touches.
Tip: Report issues on Discord so we can fix them.
Tip: Use the Turnip Gen8 V25/V30 or MrPurple T26 driver if you are on an 8 Elite device.
Tip: Lower resolution and use FSR from the quick menu in-game to boost performance.
Tip: If the entire app is crashing after loading a game, your device is running out of RAM.
Tip: Try the SurfaceFlinger renderer to improve FPS and latency.
Tip: You can enable touchscreen mode.
Tip: If you have a Mali GPU, please use System Drivers.
Tip: Getting a blank screen? Try using the \"%s\" option in the menu to check if your drivers are working correctly.
Tip: Use Proton x86-64 if you can\'t click the mouse in games.
